name: Omarchy
tagline: Beautiful, modern & opinionated Linux by DHH
description: Omarchy is DHH's (creator of Ruby on Rails) fully opinionated Arch Linux workstation — the spiritual successor to his Ubuntu-based Omakub. It ships a complete, hand-curated environment built around Hyprland, Neovim, and a suite of terminal tools, configured exactly as DHH uses daily. Version 2.0 introduced a standalone ISO installer and an AUR-free package set. There are no choices to make: you get the whole stack or nothing. Requires comfort with Arch Linux and the terminal, but rewards you with one of the most polished tiling setups available.
